Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 427}Hello there. My, my, you look like a pleasant young'un.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 427}What are you doing at a shrine, though? You don't look like the prayerful type...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 427}Me? Well, I've come a long way to pray to the god here. He's a strong one![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 427}The offertory box and the written fortunes both bring great blessings.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 427}Then there's Inari-san by the red gates... Whoo! Some crazy things might happen if you pray to him.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 427}But you have to pray for a long time... It's no problem for me, but some people might be too busy.[n]{f 1 1}
